finding_log.evidence: python3 bin/test_stop_hook.py passed after the target now reports configured=false when the env var is absent.

code-quality.notes: The only Python behavior change is scoped to skill_opportunity_review_input and keeps the payload explicit with configured=false instead of a hidden live fallback.

integration-readiness.notes: Capability fixtures, stop-hook tests, metadata validation, private-doc presence checks, and live-ID grep all passed.

evidence-quality.notes: Evidence includes focused unit tests, capability scores, stop-hook suite, metadata check, diff check, private docs presence check, and no-match live-ID grep.

spec-contract.notes: The implementation matches the approved split: private handles in ~/.codex/private, reusable workflow in notion-context, tracked artifacts using named handles/placeholders, and README/docs explain the pattern.
